name: TerraNewsEN
description: TNEWS Token is a digital asset created by TerraNewsEN, a leading crypto media brand under the TerraNews ecosystem. As TerraHaberTR and TerraNewsEN, we specialize in producing high-quality news and analytical content focused primarily on Bitcoin, LUNC, and the broader cryptocurrency market. We operate a large and established crypto news portal and have been actively delivering reliable, timely, and impactful content across multiple platforms for over five years. Our content reaches a global audience through major platforms such as CoinMarketCap, X (formerly Twitter), and Binance Square, where our work has been officially recognized with platform awards for quality and consistency. Notably, our Binance Square account has surpassed 100,000 followers, reflecting strong community trust and engagement. With years of hands-on experience in crypto journalism, market analysis, and community building, the TerraNews ecosystem brings credibility, visibility, and long-term value to the TNEWS Token. The token represents not just a digital asset, but the growth, influence, and expertise of a proven crypto media organization.
